name: storage-provider-azure-sample
description: Azure Blob Storage implementation of StorageProvider

scripts.clean: npx cross-env AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING=UseDevelopmentStorage=true npx tsx -e "import{BlobServiceClient}from'@azure/storage-blob';const c=BlobServiceClient.fromConnectionString(process.env.AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING).getContainerClient('squad-storage-demo');await c.deleteIfExists();console.log('Deleted container: squad-storage-demo')"
